https://www.okx.com/docs-v5/log_en#upcom.title: Delist instId request parameter in WS order operation channels
https://www.okx.com/docs-v5/log_en#upcom.content:
Delist instId request parameter in WS order operation channels
Last update: March 26, 2026
To reduce latency of WebSocket order operations, the following order operation channels have introduced a new request parameter, instIdCode . In the demo trading environment, the instId request parameter has been delisted. In the production environment, instId will be delisted in phases. After the delisting, any instId value provided will be ignored.
Phase 1 delisted on March 26, 2026 . The affected channels include: WS / Place order WS / Place multiple orders Phase 2 delisting date: April 7, 2026 . The affected channels include: WS / Amend order WS / Amend multiple orders WS / Cancel order WS / Cancel multiple orders
Request Parameter Name Type Required Description > instIdCode Integer Conditional Instrument ID code. If both instId and instIdCode are provided, instIdCode takes precedence. > instId String Conditional Instrument ID Will be deprecated on April 7, 2026.
Note: Users can use the Get instruments interface to map instIdCode to instId .

https://www.okx.com/docs-v5/log_en#upcom.title: NewinstCategoryenum values and reclassification of existing instruments
https://www.okx.com/docs-v5/log_en#upcom.content:
NewinstCategoryenum values and reclassification of existing instruments
Last update: March 31, 2026
New enum values are being added to the instCategory response field to provide more granular asset categorization. This change is expected to go live in late April, 2026 .
Instruments endpoint/channel
Added new enum values for instCategory Get instruments (private) Get instruments (public) Instruments channel
Parameter Type Description instCategory String The asset category of the instrument's base asset (the first segment of the instrument ID). For example, for BTC-USDT-SWAP , the instCategory represents the asset category of BTC . 1 : Crypto 3 : Stocks 4 : Commodities 5 : Forex 6 : Bonds "" : Not available
Breaking change
The following instruments currently return instCategory = 1 (Crypto). After this change goes live, their instCategory will be changed to 4 (Commodities):
XAU-USDT-SWAP XAG-USDT-SWAP XPD-USDT-SWAP XPT-USDT-SWAP XCU-USDT-SWAP NG-USDT-SWAP CL-USDT-SWAP
If your application logic depends on the instCategory value for these instruments, please update accordingly before the go-live date.

https://www.okx.com/docs-v5/log_en#upcom.title: VIP tier and contract fee adjustment
https://www.okx.com/docs-v5/log_en#upcom.content:
VIP tier and contract fee adjustment
Last update: April 2, 2026
To enable more users to enjoy VIP benefits, OKX will adjust VIP tiers and contract fees in April 2026, effective in two phases:
Phase 1: April 7, 2026 , trading fee tier access restrictions for certain Open API channels will be lowered. Phase 2: April 8, 2026 14:00–16:00 (UTC+8) , VIP tier classification standards adjustment will take effect. For more details, please refer to the business change announcement
Trading Fee Tier Requirement Changes - Channels that previously required VIP6/VIP5 or above will be accessible from VIP4 and above - Error codes 60029 and 60030 will be deprecated and unified to error code 64003 - The following table shows the changes in VIP tier requirements for accessing various Open API features:
Endpoint or Channel Before After Error Code Change SBE trades channel and books-l2-tbt channel >= VIP6 >= VIP4 64003 unchanged JSON books-l2-tbt channel >= VIP6 >= VIP4 60029 → 64003 JSON books50-l2-tbt channel >= VIP5 >= VIP4 60030 → 64003 JSON fills channel >= VIP6 >= VIP4 60029 → 64003
Sub-account Rate Limit Impact - Affected users: Only users with current trading fee tier of VIP5 or VIP6 who downgrade to VIP4 after the April 8 adjustment. Other tier users are not affected. - Background: Sub-account rate limit defaults to a maximum of 1,000 order and amend requests per 2 seconds. VIP5 and above users can obtain higher rate limits based on fill ratio. See fill ratio-based sub-account rate limit for details. - Specific impact: After the above users downgrade to VIP4, the fill ratio-based rate limit increase mechanism will no longer apply, as detailed below:
Sub-account Rate Limit Impact GET / Account rate limit Response Parameters Impact Rate limit reverts to default of 1,000 requests/2 seconds fillRatio, mainFillRatio, nextAccRateLimit values will be empty strings ""
Notes: - Please evaluate the impact of this adjustment based on your API usage and VIP tier - If you have any questions, please contact customer service or technical support
